title: Add unit tests for filesystem helpers
goal: Create tests/fs.test.mjs using node:test and the conventions from tests/args.test.mjs. Import readJsonFile, writeJsonFile, and ensureAbsolutePath from plugins/codex/scripts/lib/fs.mjs. Cover JSON write/read round trips and relative versus absolute path resolution, using isolated temporary paths and cleaning them up.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/fs.test.mjs exists and uses node:test conventions consistent with tests/args.test.mjs.
The tests verify writeJsonFile followed by readJsonFile preserves JSON data.
The tests verify ensureAbsolutePath returns an absolute path for both relative and already-absolute inputs.
